Example Co

About Example Co

Founded in 2024, Example Co builds AI-native tools that help knowledge workers focus on what matters. Our small, distributed team operates from London, Lagos, and San Francisco.

Our Mission

We believe institutional knowledge is the most under-leveraged asset in modern organizations. Our mission is to make every team's collective intelligence searchable, connected, and actionable.

The Team

Our founding team combines experience from enterprise search, developer tooling, and applied AI research. We are backed by Seedcamp and a group of angel investors from the knowledge management space.

© 2026 Example Co
